section_title: Restrictions on power of directors--The directors of a company or of a subsidiary company of a public company
content:
107. Restrictions on power of directors--The directors of a company or of a subsidiary company of a public company
shall not, except with the consent of the company concerned in general meeting--
(a) sell or dispose of the undertaking of the company; and
(b) remit any debt due by a director.

sub_sections.text: sell or dispose of the undertaking of the company; and
remit any debt due by a director.
